name: Okey Nwachie
cooked: Ok so this might be dumb but. Does anyone have a Teenage Engineering OB-4? Can that connect to a pc? It seems like that speaker might already do like 50% of what we’d want this device to do (loop, playback speed, scratch etc.) Would there be any way to start from there and build up or maybe that could give insight as to how the stems are stored translated? Lol or im living in cyberpunk 2077 and just ignore me but its an idea I had LOL
